title: nanodes schlechterianum
side_effects: Nanodes schlechterianum can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate and blood pressure due to its high levels of toxic alkaloids. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils may also cause respiratory issues, including coughing and shortness of breath. In severe cases, improper use of Nanodes schlechterianum can lead to skin irritation, including redness, itching, and blistering. Additionally, the plant's high toxicity can cause liver and kidney damage if ingested in large quantities.
